headline: Assessing Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) Valuation After Q1 Beat AI Gains And $10b Buyback
summary: The latest move in Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BK) shares has been driven by a packed Q1 update, combining an earnings beat, higher 2026 revenue guidance, AI integration progress and a new US$10b buyback. See our latest analysis for Bank of New York Mellon. BNY shares have built strong momentum in recent months, with a 17.54% 1 month share price return and a year to date gain of 15.43%. The 5 year total shareholder return of 223.35% reflects how materially distributions and price...

headline: CANADIAN BANC CORP. Monthly Dividend Declaration for Class A & Preferred Share
summary: TORONTO, April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Canadian Banc Corp. (The "Company") declares its monthly distribution of $0.16750 for each Class A share and $0.04958 for each Preferred share. Distributions are payable May 8, 2026 to shareholders on record as at April 30, 2026. Under the distribution policy announced in November 2021, the monthly dividend payable on the Class A shares is determined by applying a 15% annualized rate on the volume weighted average market price (VWAP) of the Class A sha

content.title: CANADIAN BANC CORP. Monthly Dividend Declaration for Class A & Preferred Share
content.summary: TORONTO, April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Canadian Banc Corp. (The "Company") declares its monthly distribution of $0.16750 for each Class A share and $0.04958 for each Preferred share. Distributions are payable May 8, 2026 to shareholders on record as at April 30, 2026.
